title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 14 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 14 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 14 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 14/03/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures upward. The most-traded I2505 contract closed at 794 yuan/mt, up 2.32% for the day. Tradersactively sold off, while steel mills remained cautious, purchasing as needed.
